schema: acme-prod.billing_export.gcp_billing_export_v1_ACME_PROD_BILLING, filtered WHERE labels.service = 'orders', aggregated by invoice.month
query: SELECT invoice.month, SUM(cost) AS cost, currency FROM `acme-prod.billing_export.gcp_billing_export_v1_ACME_PROD_BILLING` WHERE DATE_TRUNC(usage_start_time, MONTH) IN ('2026-03-01', '2026-04-01') AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM UNNEST(labels) AS l WHERE l.key = 'service' AND l.value = 'orders') GROUP BY 1, 3 ORDER BY 1
note: BigQuery bytes scanned: ~1.4 GB per query (estimated, depends on export table size and partition pruning). Billed at $5/TB; estimated query cost: ~$0.007 per call.
